Name: Vile Lasher
Summary: Immune plant mob with a stacking bleed tank hit plus swirlies on every player.
Description:
[Tank] Vile Bite is the main danger; use defensives or bleed cleanses as stacks climb.
[Dodge] Every player should sidestep Detonation Seeds immediately.
[Pull Size] These are one of the main reasons first area overpulls get messy fast.

Name: Guardian Sentry
Summary: Wind sentinel that pressures both tank and party with area denial.
Description:
[Tank] Use a defensive for Storm Slash.
[Movement] Deadly Winds leaves tornado pressure on random players, so keep the route open.
[Line of Sight] Run out of or line Expel Intruders behind terrain when needed.

Name: Alpha Eagle
Summary: Immune bird mob with frontal control and an enrage AoE.
Description:
[Dodge] Sidestep Gust every time it is aimed at a player.
[Soothe] Raging Screech enrages the mob and hits the party, so soothe if available.
[Tank] If Peck stacks are already high, plan a defensive before the Screech window.

Name: Corrupted Manafiend
Summary: Caster pack staple with a stop-or-die surge and splash damage.
Description:
[Kick] Interrupt Surge whenever possible.
[Spread] Mana Void targets two players, so avoid clipping allies.
[Priority] Kill these before long melee targets if your comp is kick-light.

Name: Arcane Ravager
Summary: Leap-and-frontal beast that punishes distant players.
Description:
[Positioning] Stay close enough that Vicious Ambush does not create a long leap to an isolated player.
[Dodge] After the charge, immediately sidestep Rift Breath from the tank side.
[Defensive] Use a personal if you are the leap target during overlap damage.

Name: Unruly Textbook
Summary: Annoying control mob that can be solved by kick, stop, or magic dispel.
Description:
[Kick] Interrupt Monotonous Lecture when available.
[Dispel] Once the channel starts, a magic dispel or stop can also break it.
[Utility] Save one fast answer for this mob if your pull includes harder tank pressure elsewhere.
